verses.latin_vulgate: Filius sapiens lætificat patrem,  filius vero stultus mœstitia est matris suæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִשְׁלֵ֗י שְׁלֹ֫מֹ֥ה בֵּ֣ן חָ֭כָם יְשַׂמַּח־אָ֑ב וּבֵ֥ן כְּ֝סִ֗יל תּוּגַ֥ת אִמּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: A wise son maketh the father glad: but a foolish son is the sorrow of his mother.
verses.finnish_biblia: Salomon sananlaskut. Viisas poika on isänsä ilo, mutta hullu poika on äidillensä murheeksi.
verses.king_james: The proverbs of Solomon. A wise son maketh a glad father: but a foolish son is the heaviness of his mother.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nil proderunt thesauri impietatis,  justitia vero liberabit a morte.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹֽא־י֭וֹעִילוּ אוֹצְר֣וֹת רֶ֑שַׁע וּ֝צְדָקָ֗ה תַּצִּ֥יל מִמָּֽוֶת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Treasures of wickedness shall profit nothing: but justice shall deliver from death.
verses.finnish_biblia: Väärin saatu tavara ei ole hyödyllinen; mutta vanhurskaus vapauttaa kuolemasta.
verses.king_james: Treasures of wickedness profit nothing: but righteousness delivereth from death.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non affliget Dominus fame animam justi,  et insidias impiorum subvertet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹא־יַרְעִ֣יב יְ֭הֹוָה נֶ֣פֶשׁ צַדִּ֑יק וְהַוַּ֖ת רְשָׁעִ֣ים יֶהְדֹּֽף׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord will not afflict the soul of the just with famine, and he will disappoint the deceitful practices of the wicked.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ei Herra anna vanhurskasten sielun nälkää kärsiä, mutta jumalattomain väärin saadut hän hajoittaa.
verses.king_james: The Lord will not suffer the soul of the righteous to famish: but he casteth away the substance of the wicked.

verses.latin_vulgate: Egestatem operata est manus remissa ;  manus autem fortium divitias parat.  Qui nititur mendaciis, hic pascit ventos ;  idem autem ipse sequitur aves volantes.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רָ֗אשׁ עֹשֶׂ֥ה כַף־רְמִיָּ֑ה וְיַ֖ד חָרוּצִ֣ים תַּעֲשִֽׁיר׃
verses.douay_rheims: The slothful hand hath wrought poverty: but the hand of the industrious getteth riches. He that trusteth to lies feedeth the winds: and the same runneth after birds, that fly away.
verses.finnish_biblia: Petollinen käsi tekee köyhäksi, mutta ahkera saattaa rikkaaksi.
verses.king_james: He becometh poor that dealeth with a slack hand: but the hand of the diligent maketh rich.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui congregat in messe, filius sapiens est ;  qui autem stertit æstate, filius confusionis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֹגֵ֣ר בַּ֭קַּיִץ בֵּ֣ן מַשְׂכִּ֑יל נִרְדָּ֥ם בַּ֝קָּצִ֗יר בֵּ֣ן מֵבִֽישׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: He that gathereth in the harvest, is a wise son: but he that snorteth in the summer, is the son of confusion.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka suvella kokoo, hän on toimellinen, mutta joka elonaikana makaa, hän tulee häpiään.
verses.king_james: He that gathereth in summer is a wise son: but he that sleepeth in harvest is a son that causeth shame.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedictio Domini super caput justi ;  os autem impiorum operit iniquitas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּ֭רָכוֹת לְרֹ֣אשׁ צַדִּ֑יק וּפִ֥י רְ֝שָׁעִ֗ים יְכַסֶּ֥ה חָמָֽס׃
verses.douay_rheims: The blessing of the Lord is upon the head of the just: but iniquity covereth the mouth of the wicked.
verses.finnish_biblia: Siunaus on vanhurskaan pään päällä, mutta jumalattoman suun peittää vääryys.
verses.king_james: Blessings are upon the head of the just: but violence covereth the mouth of the wicked.

verses.latin_vulgate: Memoria justi cum laudibus,  et nomen impiorum putrescet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֵ֣כֶר צַ֭דִּיק לִבְרָכָ֑ה וְשֵׁ֖ם רְשָׁעִ֣ים יִרְקָֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: The memory of the just is with praises: and the name of the wicked shall rot.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vanhurskaan muisto pysyy siunauksessa, vaan jumalattomain nimi mätänee.
verses.king_james: The memory of the just is blessed: but the name of the wicked shall rot.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sapiens corde præcepta suscipit ;  stultus cæditur labiis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חֲכַם־לֵ֭ב יִקַּ֣ח מִצְוֺ֑ת וֶאֱוִ֥יל שְׂ֝פָתַ֗יִם יִלָּבֵֽט׃
verses.douay_rheims: The wise of heart receiveth precepts: a fool is beaten with lips.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka sydämestänsä viisas on, hän ottaa käskyt vastaan; mutta jolla hullut huulet ovat, se saa haavoja.
verses.king_james: The wise in heart will receive commandments: but a prating fool shall fall.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui ambulat simpliciter ambulat confidenter ;  qui autem depravat vias suas manifestus erit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הוֹלֵ֣ךְ בַּ֭תֹּם יֵ֣לֶךְ בֶּ֑טַח וּמְעַקֵּ֥שׁ דְּ֝רָכָ֗יו יִוָּדֵֽעַ׃
verses.douay_rheims: He that walketh sincerely, walketh confidently: but he that perverteth his ways, shall be manifest.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka nuhteettomasti vaeltaa, hän elää murheetoinna; mutta joka väärällä tiellä vaeltaa, hän tulee ilmi.
verses.king_james: He that walketh uprightly walketh surely: but he that perverteth his ways shall be known.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui annuit oculo dabit dolorem ;  et stultus labiis verberabitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: קֹ֣רֵֽץ עַ֭יִן יִתֵּ֣ן עַצָּ֑בֶת וֶאֱוִ֥יל שְׂ֝פָתַ֗יִם יִלָּבֵֽט׃
verses.douay_rheims: He that winketh with the eye, shall cause sorrow: and the foolish in lips shall be beaten.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka silmää iskee, hän vaivaa matkaan saattaa, ja jolla hullut huulet ovat, hän saa haavoja.
verses.king_james: He that winketh with the eye causeth sorrow: but a prating fool shall fall.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vena vitæ os justi,  et os impiorum operit iniquitatem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מְק֣וֹר חַ֭יִּים פִּ֣י צַדִּ֑יק וּפִ֥י רְ֝שָׁעִ֗ים יְכַסֶּ֥ה חָמָֽס׃
verses.douay_rheims: The mouth of the just is a vein of life: and the mouth of the wicked covereth iniquity.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vanhurskaan suu on elämän lähde, mutta jumalattoman suun peittää vääryys.
verses.king_james: The mouth of a righteous man is a well of life: but violence covereth the mouth of the wicked.

verses.latin_vulgate: Odium suscitat rixas,  et universa delicta operit caritas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׂ֭נְאָה תְּעֹרֵ֣ר מְדָנִ֑ים וְעַ֥ל כׇּל־פְּ֝שָׁעִ֗ים תְּכַסֶּ֥ה אַהֲבָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Hatred stirreth up strifes: and charity covereth all sins.
verses.finnish_biblia: Viha riidan saattaa, mutta rakkaus peittää kaikki rikokset.
verses.king_james: Hatred stirreth up strifes: but love covereth all sins.

verses.latin_vulgate: In labiis sapientis invenitur sapientia,  et virga in dorso ejus qui indiget corde.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּשִׂפְתֵ֣י נָ֭בוֹן תִּמָּצֵ֣א חׇכְמָ֑ה וְ֝שֵׁ֗בֶט לְגֵ֣ו חֲסַר־לֵֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the lips of the wise is wisdom found: and a rod on the back of him that wanteth sense.
verses.finnish_biblia: Toimellisten huulissa löydetään viisaus, vaan tyhmäin selkään tarvitaan vitsa.
verses.king_james: In the lips of him that hath understanding wisdom is found: but a rod is for the back of him that is void of understanding.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sapientes abscondunt scientiam ;  os autem stulti confusioni proximum est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חֲכָמִ֥ים יִצְפְּנוּ־דָ֑עַת וּפִֽי־אֱ֝וִ֗יל מְחִתָּ֥ה קְרֹבָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Wise men lay up knowledge: but the mouth of the fool is next to confusion.
verses.finnish_biblia: Viisaat opin kätkevät, vaan hulluin suu on täynnä vahinkoa.
verses.king_james: Wise men lay up knowledge: but the mouth of the foolish is near destruction.

verses.latin_vulgate: Substantia divitis, urbs fortitudinis ejus ;  pavor pauperum egestas eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ה֣וֹן עָ֭שִׁיר קִרְיַ֣ת עֻזּ֑וֹ מְחִתַּ֖ת דַּלִּ֣ים רֵישָֽׁם׃
verses.douay_rheims: The substance of a rich man is the city of his strength: the fear of the poor is their poverty.
verses.finnish_biblia: Rikkaan tavara on hänen vahva kaupunkinsa; mutta köyhyys tekee köyhän pelkuriksi.
verses.king_james: The rich man’s wealth is his strong city: the destruction of the poor is their poverty.

verses.latin_vulgate: Opus justi ad vitam,  fructus autem impii ad peccatum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פְּעֻלַּ֣ת צַדִּ֣יק לְחַיִּ֑ים תְּבוּאַ֖ת רָשָׁ֣ע לְחַטָּֽאת׃
verses.douay_rheims: The work of the just is unto life: but the fruit of the wicked unto sin.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vanhurskaus tekee työtä hengen ylöspitämiseksi, mutta jumalattoman saalis on symmiksi.
verses.king_james: The labour of the righteous tendeth to life: the fruit of the wicked to sin.

verses.latin_vulgate: Via vitæ custodienti disciplinam ;  qui autem increpationes relinquit, errat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֹ֣רַח לְ֭חַיִּים שׁוֹמֵ֣ר מוּסָ֑ר וְעֹזֵ֖ב תּוֹכַ֣חַת מַתְעֶֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: The way of life, to him that observeth correction: but he that forsaketh reproofs, goeth astray.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka kurituksen ottaa vastaan, hän on elämän tiellä; mutta joka rangaistuksen heittää pois, hän menee väärin.
verses.king_james: He is in the way of life that keepeth instruction: but he that refuseth reproof erreth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Abscondunt odium labia mendacia ;  qui profert contumeliam, insipiens est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מְכַסֶּ֣ה שִׂ֭נְאָה שִׂפְתֵי־שָׁ֑קֶר וּמוֹצִ֥א דִ֝בָּ֗ה ה֣וּא כְסִֽיל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Lying lips hide hatred: he that uttereth reproach, is foolish.
verses.finnish_biblia: Petolliset suut peittävät vainon, ja joka panettelee,hän on tyhmä.
verses.king_james: He that hideth hatred with lying lips, and he that uttereth a slander, is a fool.

verses.latin_vulgate: In multiloquio non deerit peccatum,  qui autem moderatur labia sua prudentissimus est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּרֹ֣ב דְּ֭בָרִים לֹ֣א יֶחְדַּל־פָּ֑שַׁע וְחוֹשֵׂ֖ךְ שְׂפָתָ֣יו מַשְׂכִּֽיל׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the multitude of words there shall not want sin: but he that refraineth his lips, is most wise.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jossa paljo puhutaan, siitä ei synti ole kaukana; mutta joka huulensa hillitsee, hän on toimellinen.
verses.king_james: In the multitude of words there wanteth not sin: but he that refraineth his lips is wise.

verses.latin_vulgate: Argentum electum lingua justi ;  cor autem impiorum pro nihilo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֶּ֣סֶף נִ֭בְחָר לְשׁ֣וֹן צַדִּ֑יק לֵ֖ב רְשָׁעִ֣ים כִּמְעָֽט׃
verses.douay_rheims: The tongue of the just is as choice silver: but the heart of the wicked is nothing worth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vanhurskaan kieli on kalliimpi hopiaa, mutta jumalattoman sydän on miinkuin ei mitään.
verses.king_james: The tongue of the just is as choice silver: the heart of the wicked is little worth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Labia justi erudiunt plurimos ;  qui autem indocti sunt in cordis egestate morientur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׂפְתֵ֣י צַ֭דִּיק יִרְע֣וּ רַבִּ֑ים וֶ֝אֱוִילִ֗ים בַּחֲסַר־לֵ֥ב יָמֽוּתוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The lips of the just teach many: but they that are ignorant, shall die in the want of understanding.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vanhurskaan huulet monta ravitsevat, mutta hullut kuolevat hulluudessa.
verses.king_james: The lips of the righteous feed many: but fools die for want of wisdom.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedictio Domini divites facit,  nec sociabitur eis afflictio.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בִּרְכַּ֣ת יְ֭הֹוָה הִ֣יא תַעֲשִׁ֑יר וְלֹֽא־יוֹסִ֖ף עֶ֣צֶב עִמָּֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The blessing of the Lord maketh men rich: neither shall affliction be joined to them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herran siunaus tekee rikkaaksi ilman vaivaa.
verses.king_james: The blessing of the Lord, it maketh rich, and he addeth no sorrow with it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quasi per risum stultus operatur scelus,  sapientia autem est viro prudentia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּשְׂח֣וֹק לִ֭כְסִיל עֲשׂ֣וֹת זִמָּ֑ה וְ֝חׇכְמָ֗ה לְאִ֣ישׁ תְּבוּנָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: A fool worketh mischief as it were for sport: but wisdom is prudence to a man.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hullu tekee pahaa ja nauraa sitä, vaan viisas pitää siitä vaarinsa.
verses.king_james: It is as sport to a fool to do mischief: but a man of understanding hath wisdom.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quod timet impius veniet super eum ;  desiderium suum justus dabitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מְגוֹרַ֣ת רָ֭שָׁע הִ֣יא תְבוֹאֶ֑נּוּ וְתַאֲוַ֖ת צַדִּיקִ֣ים יִתֵּֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: That which the wicked feareth, shall come upon him: to the just their desire shall be given.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mitä jumalatoin pelkää, se hänelle tapahtuu, ja mitä vanhurskaat himoitsevat, sitä heille annetaan.
verses.king_james: The fear of the wicked, it shall come upon him: but the desire of the righteous shall be granted.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quasi tempestas transiens non erit impius ;  justus autem quasi fundamentum sempiternum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כַּעֲב֣וֹר ס֭וּפָה וְאֵ֣ין רָשָׁ֑ע וְ֝צַדִּ֗יק יְס֣וֹד עוֹלָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: As a tempest that passeth, so the wicked shall be no more: but the just is as an everlasting foundation.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jumalatoin on niinkuin tuulispää, joka menee ohitse ja tyhjiksi raukee; mutta vanhurskas pysyy ijankaikkisesti.
verses.king_james: As the whirlwind passeth, so is the wicked no more: but the righteous is an everlasting foundation.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sicut acetum dentibus, et fumus oculis,  sic piger his qui miserunt eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כַּחֹ֤מֶץ ׀ לַשִּׁנַּ֗יִם וְכֶעָשָׁ֥ן לָעֵינָ֑יִם כֵּ֥ן הֶ֝עָצֵ֗ל לְשֹׁלְחָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: As vinegar to the teeth, and smoke to the eyes, so is the sluggard to them that sent him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin kuin etikka tekee pahaa hampaille ja savu silmille, niin on laiska niiden mielestä paha, jotka hänen lähettävät.
verses.king_james: As vinegar to the teeth, and as smoke to the eyes, so is the sluggard to them that send him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Timor Domini apponet dies,  et anni impiorum breviabuntur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִרְאַ֣ת יְ֭הֹוָה תּוֹסִ֣יף יָמִ֑ים וּשְׁנ֖וֹת רְשָׁעִ֣ים תִּקְצֹֽרְנָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: The fear of the Lord shall prolong days: and the years of the wicked shall be shortened.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herran pelko enentää päiviä, vaan jumalattomain vuodet vähennetään.
verses.king_james: The fear of the Lord prolongeth days: but the years of the wicked shall be shortened.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exspectatio justorum lætitia,  spes autem impiorum peribit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תּוֹחֶ֣לֶת צַדִּיקִ֣ים שִׂמְחָ֑ה וְתִקְוַ֖ת רְשָׁעִ֣ים תֹּאבֵֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: The expectation of the just is joy: but the hope of the wicked shall perish.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vanhurskaan toivo on ilo, mutta jumalattomain toivo katoo.
verses.king_james: The hope of the righteous shall be gladness: but the expectation of the wicked shall perish.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fortitudo simplicis via Domini,  et pavor his qui operantur malum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מָע֣וֹז לַ֭תֹּם דֶּ֣רֶךְ יְהֹוָ֑ה וּ֝מְחִתָּ֗ה לְפֹ֣עֲלֵי אָֽוֶן׃
verses.douay_rheims: The strength of the upright is the way of the Lord: and fear to them that work evil.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herran tie on hurskasten väkevyys, mutta pahointekiät ovat pelkurit.
verses.king_james: The way of the Lord is strength to the upright: but destruction shall be to the workers of iniquity.

verses.latin_vulgate: Justus in æternum non commovebitur,  impii autem non habitabunt super terram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: צַ֭דִּיק לְעוֹלָ֣ם בַּל־יִמּ֑וֹט וּ֝רְשָׁעִ֗ים לֹ֣א יִשְׁכְּנוּ־אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The just shall never be moved: but the wicked shall not dwell on the earth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vanhurskas pysyy aina kohdallansa kukistamatta, mutta jumalattoman ei pidä asuman maan päällä.
verses.king_james: The righteous shall never be removed: but the wicked shall not inhabit the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Os justi parturiet sapientiam ;  lingua pravorum peribit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פִּֽי־צַ֭דִּיק יָנ֣וּב חׇכְמָ֑ה וּלְשׁ֥וֹן תַּ֝הְפֻּכ֗וֹת תִּכָּרֵֽת׃
verses.douay_rheims: The mouth of the just shall bring forth wisdom: the tongue of the perverse shall perish.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vanhurskaan suu tuottaa viisauden, vaan vääräin kieli hukutetaan.
verses.king_james: The mouth of the just bringeth forth wisdom: but the froward tongue shall be cut out.

verses.latin_vulgate: Labia justi considerant placita,  et os impiorum perversa.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׂפְתֵ֣י צַ֭דִּיק יֵדְע֣וּן רָצ֑וֹן וּפִ֥י רְ֝שָׁעִ֗ים תַּהְפֻּכֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: The lips of the just consider what is acceptable: and the mouth of the wicked uttereth perverse things.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vanhurskaan huulet opettavat terveellisiä asioita, vaan jumalattoman suu on täynnä vääryyttä.
verses.king_james: The lips of the righteous know what is acceptable: but the mouth of the wicked speaketh frowardness.
